description_long: This is a modern, rectangular office building with four visible stories and a flat roof, featuring a rooftop structure and various mechanical installations. The facade is dominated by horizontal bands of large, regularly spaced windows separated by light-colored panels, giving the building a sleek, contemporary appearance. The exterior walls appear to be clad in glass and metal, with subtle textural variations and a muted blue-gray color palette. The roof is partially covered with snow and includes solar panels, HVAC units, and a small penthouse structure. The ground level includes a main entrance, visible walkways, and some landscaping around the perimeter. The building sits on a paved lot with adjacent green areas and parking spaces.
description: A modern, four-story office building with a flat roof, horizontal window bands, and a blue-gray glass and metal facade.
description_view_0: This view shows the building's main facade with prominent horizontal window bands, a visible entrance, and adjacent parking spaces.
description_view_1: The front entrance is clearly visible, along with the main walkway and some landscaping; rooftop details are also apparent.
description_view_2: This side highlights the building's regular window pattern and the rooftop structure, with less visible ground-level detail.
description_view_3: The rear facade is shown, with consistent window bands and a clear view of the flat roof and surrounding green area.
attribute_window_pattern: Continuous horizontal bands of large, rectangular windows with regular spacing and repetitive alignment across all floors.
